message:
refactor(web): extract request extractors and query helpers to web/extractors.rs [ft-1zej2]

Move require_storage(), require_event_bus(), require_storage_and_event_bus(),
parse_limit(), parse_u64(), parse_i64(), parse_bool(), and redact_json_value()
from web.rs to web/extractors.rs. Re-export via `use extractors::{...}` to
maintain compatibility with handlers.rs and sse.rs which use `use super::*`.

web.rs: 1550 -> 1447 lines (-103)
extractors.rs: 3 -> 139 lines (+136)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
